examples: The lichen identification was based on color data.
One of the smallest is the Lichen plant which grows on stones.
Lichen eats away at granite and over time can cause cracks and pockmarks.
Our headlamps played tricks with colour, turning new spruce tips silver and making a lichen-shagged tree sparkle.
Around 400 species of lichen, which is a cross between a fungus and an algae, grow in the reserve.
